summary: Live Shopify Function ownership metadata for released validation and cart-transform functions in the conformance app.

errors.message: Access denied for validationCreate field. Required access: `write_validations` access scope.

Access denied for cartTransformCreate field. Required access: `write_cart_transforms` access scope. Also: The shop must have
[upgraded to Checkout Extensibility](https://help.shopify.com/manual/checkout-settings/checkout-extensibility/checkout-upgrade)
and the user must have
[products and preferences permission](https://help.shopify.com/manual/your-account/staff-accounts/staff-permissions)
to create a cart transform function.

extensions.requiredAccess:

and the user must have

to create a cart transform function.

errors.message: Access denied for taxAppConfigure field. Required access: `write_taxes` access scope. Also: The caller must be a tax calculations app.

extensions.requiredAccess: `write_taxes` access scope. Also: The caller must be a tax calculations app.

blockers.validationAndCartTransformUserErrors: The app configuration now declares read/write validation and cart-transform scopes, but the stored OAuth grant could not be regranted unattended. validationCreate/cartTransformCreate probes therefore stop at ACCESS_DENIED before wrong API type, duplicate constraint, cross-app, or metafield userErrors are reachable.
blockers.taxAppReadiness: taxAppConfigure is authority-gated by write_taxes and tax calculations app status; the live probe records Shopify ACCESS_DENIED authority evidence.
